243_emojis.description: More ways to express yourself in chat

243_sound.description: Adjust volume directly from the fight player

243_ranking.description: Better default level ranges in rankings

244_composition_ranking.description: Compare team compositions in a dedicated leaderboard

244_vue3.description: Full framework migration for better performance

244_error_large.description: Know exactly which line is causing the size limit

245_switch.description: Supports fall-through and all value types — each case costs 1 operation

245_null_coalesce.description: Unlike 'or', ?? only checks null — so 0 ?? 42 returns 0

245_not_in.description: Saves 1 operation compared to not (x in array)

245_teams.description: Activity scores, match ratings and up to 5 applications at once

245_likes.description: Show some appreciation for your favorite farmers

245_team_tournaments.description: Only shown when the team has at least one win

245_team_rename.description: 10M habs or 200 crystals, once per week

245_team_language.description: Welcome messages in chat adapt to the team's language

245_market_expand.description: Quick overview without opening each item

245_fight_tooltip.description: See the breakdown: free, purchased and team fights

246_war.description: Two teams clash in XL battles — launched from the Garden like BR

246_trophies.description: Daily trophies, exploits and a new Arenas category for all 3 modes

246_narrowing.description: After a null check, the compiler knows x is non-null — fewer casts needed

246_symbols.description: Jump to any function, class or global variable instantly

246_item_stats.description: Weekly usage sparkline: see how often each weapon/chip is used per fight

246_name_validation.description: No more duplicate names and warnings for Windows-incompatible characters

246_folder.description: Deleted folders can now be restored from the trash

247_google.description: Sign in and register instantly with your Google account
